approaches.title: Two-phase update using change lists
approaches.summary: Computes each cell’s next state from the original board, storing cells to kill and spawn before applying all changes.

revisions.shortChangeSummary: Implemented Game of Life with separate dead-cell and spawn-cell lists, using O(n*m) auxiliary space.

approaches.title: In-place state encoding with bit manipulation
approaches.summary: Encodes each cell’s next state in a spare bit while preserving the current state in the low bit, then shifts all cells to finalize the update.

revisions.shortChangeSummary: Replaced auxiliary change lists with in-place bit marking, reducing auxiliary space to O(1) while retaining O(n*m) time.
